description: CRUX hooks - compression queue, memory nudges, and source change detection

sessionStart.description: CRUX: Display pending compressions and memory nudges at session start

afterFileEdit.description: CRUX: Queue modified source files (with crux: true) for CRUX compression
CRUX: Flag memory index for rebuild when memory files change

afterAgentResponse.description: CRUX: Auto-track memory references from [memory:*] annotations in agent output
